variables.description: Do some of these attacks come suddenly out of the blue that is in situations where you don't expect to be nervous or uncomfortable

variables.name: AnxietyAttackSymptoms
variables.description: Did you experience these symptoms during your last bad anxiety attack shortness of breath heart racing or pounding dizziness or faintness tingling or numbness nausea or an upset stomach

variables.name: AnxietyAttackWorries
variables.description: Do these attacks bother you a lot or are you worried about having another attack
